name: Tangy Turkey Tenderloins
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup frozen Florida orange juice concentrate, thawed
4 turkey breast tenderloin steaks (about 1 pound total)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, stir together thawed concentrate, molasses, catsup, mustard, soy sauce, garlic powder, ground red pepper, and cumin.
2. Set aside 1/2 cup of the sauce to brush on turkey.
3. Rinse the turkey; pat dry with paper towels.
4. Place turkey on the unheated rack of a broiler pan. Broil 4 to 5 inches from the heat for 8 to 10 minutes or until tender and no longer pink, turning once and brushing with the reserved orange sauce during the last 5 minutes of broiling.
5. To serve, heat remaining sauce until boiling and serve with turkey. Cover and chill leftover sauce for up to 2 weeks; reheat to boiling before using.
6. Makes 4 servings (1 turkey steak and about 1/3 cup sauce).
